npcs.name: Lunina
npcs.greeting: Welcome back, little one. The moon missed you!

idle.text: The stars are bright tonight, aren't they?
Your pet looks up to you, you know.
Every moment you spend here is pure magic.
The moonlight makes everything more beautiful.

happy.text: Oh! Your pet is glowing with joy!
Look at that happy little face! Wonderful.

sad.text: Hmm, your pet needs some attention. Don't forget to feed them!
The moon is watching — take care of your friend.

npcs.name: Stellina
npcs.greeting: Yay, you're here! Let's play play play!

idle.text: Have you tried the Magic Garden yet?
I found a new star last night! It was SO sparkly!
Your pet loves it when you visit every day!
Did you know pets grow faster when they're happy?

happy.text: Your pet is over the moon with happiness!

sad.text: Aw no! Quick, give your pet a hug!
Maybe some yummy food would help? Just saying!

idle.text: Patience is the greatest magic of all.
A well-fed pet thinks more clearly. Remember that.
The Library holds secrets for those who seek them.

happy.text: I am... pleased. Do not let it show.

sad.text: Your pet's stats are declining. This is unacceptable.
